title: Mobs Ability Enhancement│生物能力增強
description: Enhanced the mobs' ability to pick up equipment and break doors.│強化了生物撿取裝備以及破門的能力。
body:
# Function│功能
- All zombies, zombie villagers, Drowneds, husks, zombified piglins, skeletons, strays, boggeds, wither skeletons, pillagers, vindicators, and illusionists can pick up and wear or hold equipment.│所有殭屍、殭屍村民、溺屍、屍殼、殭屍豬靈、骷髏、流浪者、沼骸、凋零骷髏、掠奪者、衛道士、幻術師皆可撿起並穿戴或手持裝備。
- All zombie-type mobs can break doors.│殭屍類生物皆可破門。
